name: @codemastersolutions/commitzero
description: Conventional Commits validator with a friendly CLI, Git hooks, and an internal rule engine — zero runtime dependencies.

scripts.build: pnpm run build:esm && pnpm run build:cjs && node scripts/postbuild-cjs.js
scripts.test: node --import tsx --test test/unit/select.test.ts test/unit/formatter.test.ts test/unit/rules.test.ts test/unit/parser.test.ts test/integration/cleanup.test.ts test/integration/cli.test.ts test/integration/precommit.test.ts && COMMITSKIP_SELECT_PROMPT=1 node --import tsx --test test/unit/commit.test.ts
scripts.coverage: pnpm run build && COMMITSKIP_ADD_PROMPT=1 c8 -r text-summary node --import tsx --test test/unit/select.test.ts test/unit/formatter.test.ts test/unit/rules.test.ts test/unit/parser.test.ts test/integration/cleanup.test.ts test/integration/cli.test.ts test/integration/precommit.test.ts
scripts.coverage:subset: pnpm run build && c8 -r text-summary node --import tsx --test test/unit/select.test.ts test/unit/formatter.test.ts test/integration/cleanup.test.ts test/integration/cli.test.ts test/integration/precommit.test.ts
scripts.sonar:scan: pnpm run coverage && docker run --rm --add-host=host.docker.internal:host-gateway -e SONAR_HOST_URL=http://host.docker.internal:9000 -e SONAR_TOKEN="$SONAR_TOKEN" -e SONAR_USER_HOME=/tmp/.sonar -v "$PWD:/usr/src" sonarsource/sonar-scanner-cli:latest
scripts.sonar:export:metrics: node --input-type=module -e "import fs from 'node:fs'; import path from 'node:path'; const host=process.env.SONAR_HOST_URL || 'http://localhost:9000'; const token=process.env.SONAR_TOKEN; if (!token) { console.error('SONAR_TOKEN is required'); process.exit(1); } const dir=path.resolve('sonar'); fs.mkdirSync(dir,{recursive:true}); const url=new URL('/api/measures/component', host); url.searchParams.set('component','commitzero'); url.searchParams.set('metricKeys','bugs,vulnerabilities,security_hotspots,code_smells,coverage,duplicated_lines_density,ncloc'); const auth='Basic ' + Buffer.from(token + ':').toString('base64'); const res=await fetch(url,{headers:{Authorization:auth}}); if(!res.ok){throw new Error('HTTP ' + res.status + ' ' + res.statusText);} const json=await res.json(); fs.writeFileSync(path.join(dir,'metrics.json'), JSON.stringify(json,null,2)+'\\n'); console.log('Wrote sonar/metrics.json');"
scripts.sonar:export:quality-gate: node --input-type=module -e "import fs from 'node:fs'; import path from 'node:path'; const host=process.env.SONAR_HOST_URL || 'http://localhost:9000'; const token=process.env.SONAR_TOKEN; if (!token) { console.error('SONAR_TOKEN is required'); process.exit(1); } const dir=path.resolve('sonar'); fs.mkdirSync(dir,{recursive:true}); const url=new URL('/api/qualitygates/project_status', host); url.searchParams.set('projectKey','commitzero'); const auth='Basic ' + Buffer.from(token + ':').toString('base64'); const res=await fetch(url,{headers:{Authorization:auth}}); if(!res.ok){throw new Error('HTTP ' + res.status + ' ' + res.statusText);} const json=await res.json(); fs.writeFileSync(path.join(dir,'quality-gate.json'), JSON.stringify(json,null,2)+'\\n'); console.log('Wrote sonar/quality-gate.json');"
scripts.sonar:export:issues: node --input-type=module -e "import fs from 'node:fs'; import path from 'node:path'; const host=process.env.SONAR_HOST_URL || 'http://localhost:9000'; const token=process.env.SONAR_TOKEN; if (!token) { console.error('SONAR_TOKEN is required'); process.exit(1); } const dir=path.resolve('sonar'); fs.mkdirSync(dir,{recursive:true}); const pageSize=500; let page=1; const issues=[]; while(true){ const url=new URL('/api/issues/search', host); url.searchParams.set('componentKeys','commitzero'); url.searchParams.set('ps', String(pageSize)); url.searchParams.set('p', String(page)); const auth='Basic ' + Buffer.from(token + ':').toString('base64'); const res=await fetch(url,{headers:{Authorization:auth}}); if(!res.ok){throw new Error('HTTP ' + res.status + ' ' + res.statusText);} const json=await res.json(); issues.push(...(json.issues||[])); const total=Number(json.total||0); if(page*pageSize>=total) break; page++; } fs.writeFileSync(path.join(dir,'issues.json'), JSON.stringify({projectKey:'commitzero', exportedAt:new Date().toISOString(), issues},null,2)+'\\n'); console.log('Wrote sonar/issues.json (' + issues.length + ' issues)');"
scripts.sonar:export: pnpm sonar:export:metrics && pnpm sonar:export:quality-gate && pnpm sonar:export:issues
